in_scope: freeze workspace doctor -> source intake / source research -> deliverable create -> deliverable audit -> deliverable run as one repo-verified operator quickstart surface on the same mainline

make brand-new and thin workspace bootstrap behavior explicit around redcube.workspace.json, topics/<topic>/canonical, and deliverable surfaces without introducing a separate workspace init product surface
align README, docs index, human quickstart, CLI help surface, and runtime behavior around the same canonical bootstrap and operator route
keep planning_ready, audit/watch/review/projection semantics, and xiaohongshu human-publication boundary unchanged while tightening the operator entry path
out_of_scope: paper_poster or conference_poster academic contract advancement
hidden fallback chains as main behavior
rewriting Deep Research as MedDeepScientist Scout plus Idea

operator_quickstart_surface.step_1_bootstrap_rule: source research always starts with source intake before deciding whether augmentation execution is required
operator_quickstart_surface.deliverable_audit_rule: auditDeliverable stays fail-closed on source_readiness_summary and gate_summary before downstream delivery claims
operator_quickstart_surface.deliverable_run_rule: deliverable run remains the routed execution surface after hydrated contract creation

must_keep_honest: planning_ready remains the machine-readable Source Readiness gate
source research remains shared Source Readiness augmentation rather than Storyline rewrite
workspace doctor remains diagnostic; bootstrap truth is written by source intake or source research rather than a hidden fallback chain

required_commands: node --test tests/runtime-alignment-p0.test.ts tests/phase-2-workspace-operator-quickstart-convergence.test.ts tests/workspace-operator-quickstart.test.ts tests/public-docs-surface.test.ts tests/source-intake.test.ts tests/source-research.test.ts tests/cli-v2-smoke.test.ts tests/deliverable-review-loop.test.ts tests/direct-delivery-operator-handoff.test.ts tests/phase-2-behavior-convergence.test.ts

must_record: workspace doctor, source intake / source research, deliverable create, deliverable audit, and deliverable run now form one repo-verified operator quickstart surface
brand-new and thin workspace bootstrap stays on the canonical workspace contract with source intake / source research writing redcube.workspace.json and topic canonical artifacts
audit/watch/review/projection semantics remain aligned on planning_ready and canonical governance surfaces
xiaohongshu remains explicit human publication while ppt_deck and guarded poster_onepager keep direct-delivery semantics
must_not_claim: managed web runtime migration is now the current repo truth
